summary: Validated upgraded CAOS backend + frontend shell end-to-end on the public preview URL. Artifact persistence/retrieval, profile surface, drawers, message actions, receipt hydration, and session flows all passed.

integration_issues.flow: Initial shell bootstrap for a brand-new user email
integration_issues.issue: GET /api/caos/profile/{email} returns 404 before profile upsert, which is handled in UI but still appears as failed network request in browser console.

action_items: Optional: reduce noisy console 404s for new users by lazy-loading profile after first upsert or by adding a non-404 bootstrap profile strategy.
Optional: debounce/submit-gate user-email changes to avoid repeated bootstrap API churn while typing.
critical_code_review_comments: useCaosShell hydration path re-runs as user_email changes, causing repeated full session bootstrap requests on each keystroke.
Chat route still exposes raw exception detail via HTTP 500 detail; sanitize server error payloads before returning to clients.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md before testing; file currently contains no credentials.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST-isolated records via public APIs using unique tester_<timestamp>@example.com users and new sessions/messages/artifacts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite expanded with profile GET and session artifacts endpoint assertions after /api/caos/chat. Frontend e2e validated: create thread, send message, assistant reply render, copy/read actions, clipboard-denied handling, profile drawer, artifacts drawer, search, rail selection, and receipt hydration after reload.
rca of the issue: Observed browser-console 404 when entering a new user email: useCaosShell.loadProfile() calls GET /api/caos/profile/{email} before profile exists. UI catches this and continues, so it is non-blocking but noisy.
